<!-- Generated by the webadmin-gap-analysis workflow (6 parallel GWT-source surveys + synthesis), 2026-07-06. -->

# oVirt Console — webadmin Parity Gap Report

## 1. Executive summary

The rebuild has reached **read/monitor parity** across every webadmin entity and **deep write parity** on the daily-driver core (VM lifecycle, consoles, snapshots, disks, NICs, migration, folders/tags, host add/install + setup-networks, DC/cluster/network/NFS-domain CRUD). Detail pages exist for all eight entities, and several surfaces (folder tree, ⌘K palette, notification drawer) exceed webadmin. What remains is the **administrative CRUD long-tail** — the "config 80%" of Phase 6. The 3–5 biggest genuine gaps, in order: **(1) VM/Template import** (from export domain, OVA, and external VMware/Xen/KVM providers, plus the register-unregistered-from-storage flow) is entirely absent and is the largest single admin capability missing; **(2) Storage-domain lifecycle** — no Edit/Remove/Destroy and, critically, no Attach/Detach/Activate/Maintenance actions, so domains can be created but never managed day-to-day; **(3) Governance CRUD** — no role editor, no system-permissions surface, no add-user-from-directory, no scheduling-policy editor; **(4) Cluster dialog depth** — the new/edit cluster modal is missing scheduling/migration/fencing/console/MAC-pool tabs; and **(5) affinity + host runtime actions** (create/edit affinity groups & labels; host fence/reinstall/refresh-caps/upgrade/console). Everything deferred (DWH analytics, gluster volume management) is intentional per PLAN.md and MEMORY.

## 2. Coverage scorecard

Counts are per the inventories. "% core+common covered" credits `present` as 1.0 and `partial` as 0.5, over all `core`+`common` features in the area (excludes niche / deferred / out-of-scope).

| Area | Present | Partial | Missing | Deferred/OOS | Core+Common covered |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| Compute — VMs / Templates / Pools / Instance Types / Affinity | 24 | 14 | 8 | 2 | **~68%** |
| Compute — Data Centers / Clusters / Hosts | 22 | 12 | 27 | 5 | **~55%** |
| Storage — Domains / Disks / Volumes / Profiles | 13 | 1 | 33 | 3 | **~32%** |
| Network — Networks / vNIC Profiles / Host setup / QoS | 14 | 8 | 14 | 0 | **~54%** |
| Administration / Configure | 4 | 5 | 20 | 0 | **~26%** |
| Dashboard / Events / Tasks / cross-cutting | 15 | 8 | 6 | 2 | **~66%** |
| **Totals** | **92** | **48** | **108** | **14** | **~50%** |

Read-paths and core VM/detail work carry the high-coverage areas; Storage and Administration are the weakest because their long-tail is almost all mutation.

## 3. Missing — CORE & COMMON

Ranked by importance within each area. Niche, deferred, and out-of-scope items are excluded here (see §5). Effort: **S** = a modal + one resource fn; **M** = multi-field dialog or new subtab with actions; **L** = new pipeline/wizard or cross-cutting framework.

### Storage (weakest area — the config surface is mostly absent)

| Gap | webadmin source | One-liner | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Domain lifecycle: Attach / Detach / Activate / Maintenance** *(core)* | `StorageDataCenterActionPanelPresenterWidget`; DC storage subtab | The daily-driver domain state machine; attach exists only buried inside New Domain. | **M** |
| **New Storage Domain — Manage / Edit** *(common)* | `NewEditStorageModelBehavior` | Cannot rename, retune warning/critical space, wipe-after-delete, backup flag, or add LUNs. | **M** |
| **Remove Storage Domain** *(common)* | `RemoveStorageModel` | No detach-format-delete via a chosen host. | **S** |
| **Destroy Storage Domain** *(common)* | `RemoveStorageModel` (destroy) | No force-remove-from-DB for unreachable domains. | **S** |
| **Disk main tab — New (image / direct-LUN / managed-block)** *(core)* | `DiskListModel` New / `DisksAllocationModel` | Disks page has no New button; `createDisk` is internal to upload only. | **M** |
| **Disk main tab — Remove** *(core)* | `DiskListModel` Remove | No user-facing floating-disk delete with confirm. | **S** |
| **Disk main tab — Edit** *(common)* | `DiskListModel` Edit | No rename/grow/shareable/wipe/profile edit on a floating disk. | **S** |
| **SD subtab — VM Import / Template Import (register unregistered)** *(common)* | `SubTabStorageRegisterVm/Template`; `RegisterVmModel` | Cannot register VMs/templates resident on an attached data/export domain (the cross-DC move mechanism). | **L** |
| **New Storage Domain — GlusterFS / POSIX** *(common)* | `GlusterStorageModel` / `PosixStorageModel` | Modal offers only NFS/iSCSI/FC; no path+vfs_type domains. | **S** |
| **Import Storage Domain** *(common)* | `ImportStorageModelBehavior` | No attach-a-pre-existing-unattached-domain flow. | **M** |
| **SD subtab — Data Center** *(common)* | `StorageDataCenterListModel` | Missing the per-DC grid where domain lifecycle actions live. | **M** |
| **SD subtab — Disk Profiles** + **Disk Profiles** + **Storage QoS** *(common)* | `SubTabStorageDiskProfilePresenter`; DC QoS (Storage) | No profile CRUD binding a storage QoS to a domain, and no storage-QoS authoring. | **M** |

### Compute — VMs / Templates / Pools / Affinity

| Gap | webadmin source | One-liner | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| **VM Import (export domain / OVA / external providers)** *(common)* | `ImportVmModel` + source models | No VM import anywhere — export exists, import doesn't; the single biggest VM-area gap. | **L** |
| **VM action: Change CD** *(common)* | `VmChangeCDPopupWidget` | Running VM can't mount/eject an ISO. | **S** |
| **VM action: Run Once** *(common)* | `RunOnceModel` | No override-boot / attach-CD / one-shot sysprep+cloud-init / run-as-stateless launch. | **L** |
| **Affinity Groups — create/edit/delete** *(common)* | `NewAffinityGroupModel` / `EntitySelectionModel` | Cluster & VM affinity tabs are read-only; no rule/member/positive-negative editor. | **M** |
| **VM subtab: Affinity Groups — attach/create** *(common)* | `SubTabVirtualMachineAffinityGroupPresenter` | Read-only; can't add the VM to a group from its own tab. | **S** |
| **Pool subtab: Virtual Machines** *(common)* | `SubTabPoolVmPresenter` | No pool-members list with VM actions. | **M** |
| **Template: New (standalone, full depth)** *(common)* | `TemplateVmModelBehavior` | Standalone New Template is thin (name/desc/OS/stateless); missing the VM-parity tab set. | **M** |

### Compute — Data Centers / Clusters / Hosts

| Gap | webadmin source | One-liner | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Cluster New/Edit — full tab set** *(core)* | `ClusterModel` (scheduling/migration/console/fencing/MAC-pool) | Single flat modal; missing scheduling policy, migration policy, fencing, console-proxy, MAC pool, switch/firewall type. | **L** |
| **Host — Reinstall / Install (re-deploy)** *(common)* | `HostListModel.installCommand` | Kernel/hosted-engine sections say "applies on next reinstall" but the reinstall action is absent. | **M** |
| **Host — Refresh Capabilities** *(common)* | `refreshCapabilitiesCommand` | Can't re-detect host hardware. | **S** |
| **Host — Fence agent CRUD** *(common)* | `FenceAgentListModel` / `FenceAgentModel` | PM flags round-trip but agents (type/address/creds/proxy) must be added via raw REST. | **M** |
| **Host — Host Console (Cockpit)** *(common)* | `hostConsoleCommand` | No SSO link to the host's Cockpit console. | **S** |
| **Host — Restart/Reboot (fence)** + **Start/Stop** + **SSH Restart/Stop** *(common)* | `restart/start/stop/sshRestart/sshStopCommand` | No fence- or SSH-based power actions on a host. | **M** |
| **Host — Check for Upgrade / Upgrade** *(common)* | `checkForUpgrade/upgradeCommand` | No per-host package upgrade path. | **M** |
| **Cluster — Upgrade** *(common)* | cluster upgrade manager | No rolling cluster upgrade. | **M** |
| **DC — Change QoS (all five types, CRUD)** *(common)* | DC QoS action panels | QoS listed read-only; no add/edit/remove, no per-type params. | **M** |
| **DC / Cluster / Host detail — in-tab actions** *(common)* | `DataCenterStorage/Network`, `ClusterHost/Network/CpuProfile` action panels | Storage/Network/Host/CPU-profile subtabs are read-only lists; webadmin acts from them (attach/detach, Manage Networks, CPU-profile CRUD). | **L** |
| **Guide Me — DC / cluster** *(common)* | `DataCenterGuideModel` / `ClusterListModel.guideCommand` | No post-create guided next-step flow. | **M** |

### Network

| Gap | webadmin source | One-liner | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Cluster-side network management (Manage Networks + role toggles)** *(common)* | `ClusterNetworkModel` + action panel | Cluster/DC network tabs read-only; no assign/unassign or Required/Display/Migration/Gluster/default-route toggles. | **M** |
| **Network QoS — create/edit/remove** *(common)* | `NetworkQoSModel` / `NetworkQoSPopupView` | Can select existing network QoS in a vNIC profile but can't author one (inbound/outbound avg/peak/burst). | **M** |

| **External / provider (OVN) network authoring** *(common)* | `NetworkModel` external branch + `ExternalSubnetModel` | New/Edit dialog can't create on an external provider (physical net, port security, subnet CIDR/gateway/DNS). | **M** |
| **Network detail — Clusters subtab** *(common)* | `SubTabNetworkClusterPresenter` + panel | No network-side cluster attach/detach + role toggles. | **M** |
| **New/Edit network — missing fields** *(core)* | `NetworkModel` | Missing Comment, STP, Port Isolation, Label, QoS picker, DNS on New/Edit. | **S** |
| **Host Setup Networks — bond create/edit/remove** *(common)* | `SetupNetworksBondPopupView` | Bond masters are attach targets only; no bond dialog (mode/name/members). | **M** |
| **Host Setup Networks — IPv6 configuration** *(common)* | `NetworkAttachmentModel` IPv6 leg | Editor exposes no IPv6 boot-protocol/address/prefix/gateway. | **M** |

### Administration / Configure

| Gap | webadmin source | One-liner | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Add Users/Groups from directory (AAA)** *(core)* | `AdElementListModel` add | Directory search feeds Add-Permission, but no action POSTs a principal into `/users`; no domain picker. | **M** |
| **Custom Role create/edit (permission tree)** *(common)* | `RoleModel` / `RoleTreeView` | No role editor / permission-checkbox tree; can't define or clone roles. | **L** |
| **System Permissions management** *(common)* | `SystemPermissionListModel` / `SystemPermissionView` | System-level grants are read for capability profiling only; no add/remove UI. | **M** |
| **Scheduling Policies — list + create/edit** *(common)* | `ClusterPolicyListModel` / `NewClusterPolicyModel` | No policy list, no filter/weight/load-balance/custom-property editor. | **L** |
| **Add / Edit / Remove Provider + Test Connection** *(common)* | `AddProviderModel` / `ProviderModel` | Providers page is read-only; no type-switched add dialog, edit, test, or remove. | **L** |
| **Provider-based Import VM/Template** *(common)* | `ImportVmModel` (external provider) | Ties to the VM/Template import gap; no source-provider import. | **L** |
| **Add/Edit Quota dialog** *(common)* | `QuotaModel` / `EditQuotaCluster/StorageModel` | Quotas read-only; no enforce/audit mode, no cluster CPU/mem or storage-GiB limits. | **M** |
| **Groups list / management** *(common)* | user group subtab | `/groups` feeds only the assignee picker; no Groups nav/page. | **S** |
| **Remove User** *(common)* | user action panel | No remove-user action. | **S** |
| **Configure dialog aggregate** *(common)* | `ConfigurePopupView` | No unified Configure entry (Roles / System Perms / Scheduling / Instance Types / MAC Pools); only Instance Types has a home. | **M** (once the pieces exist) |
| **Guide Me framework** *(common)* | `ActionableEventListModel` / `GuidePopupView` | The single biggest cross-cutting capability missing; no contextual post-create guidance anywhere. | **L** |
| **User detail page (General/Permissions/Quota/Groups/…)** *(common)* | `SubTabUser*View` | No user-centric detail route. | **M** |

### Cross-cutting

| Gap | webadmin source | One-liner | Effort |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Tasks/Jobs — step-level detail (job → steps tree)** *(common)* | `TasksView` (`/jobs/{id}/steps`) | Tasks drawer shows jobs only; no per-step status/timing — the main value for long ops. | **M** |
| **Import/Register VMs & Templates between DCs** *(common)* | `ImportVmsPopupView` / storage import subtabs | Export + clone exist; register-unregistered / cross-DC import does not. | **L** |

## 4. Partial — needs deepening

Features present but shallow versus webadmin. Listed with the specific missing piece.

- **New/Edit VM & Edit VM dialog** — 5 of 14 tabs present (General, System, Console, HA, Boot Options). **Missing 9 tabs:** Initial Run (sysprep + full cloud-init: networks/DNS/timezone/custom script), Host (placement/pinning/pass-through CPU/NUMA), Resource Allocation (CPU profile/shares, memory balloon, IO threads, VirtIO-SCSI, disk provisioning), RNG device, Custom Properties, Icon, Foreman, Affinity Labels, Pool. Also no Next-Run configuration dialog on edits that require reboot.
- **VM subtab: Disks** — attach/add/remove present; verify **Activate/Deactivate/Move/Copy/Sparsify** depth against `VmDiskSparsifyPopup`.
- **VM subtab: Host Devices** — confirm **Add/Remove pass-through**; if list-only, that's the gap.
- **VM subtabs: Affinity Labels** — read-only; **assign/remove label** missing (mutation).
- **Templates: New/Edit** — thin (name/desc/comment/OS/stateless); missing the VM-parity tabs (resource allocation, console, HA, custom properties, icon) and sub-version depth.
- **Template subtab: Network Interfaces** — verify add/edit/remove vNIC vs read-only.
- **Pools: New/Edit** — solid core (name/cluster/template/type/size/prestarted/max-per-user); missing the inherited per-VM tab set and pool-stateless/sealed nuances. Pool **General** is edit-modal-only, not a browsable detail route.
- **Instance Types** — full CRUD present; missing the deeper VM-parity fields (console, resource allocation, custom properties).
- **sysprep / cloud-init** — create wizard covers only hostname/root-pw/SSH-key; missing cloud-init networks/DNS/timezone/custom-script/user and the **entire Windows sysprep path** — and these are absent from Edit and (missing) Run Once.
- **DC New/Edit** — field parity essentially complete; only gap is **MAC pool selection** (read-only today).
- **DC / SD / Network / Cluster QoS subtabs** — read-only lists; no CRUD, no per-type parameters (bandwidth/IOPS/CPU-limit).
- **Host — Setup Networks** — strong (attach/detach/move, IPv4 static, per-row sync, mgmt guard, verify+commit); deferred **bonds, IPv6, DNS, custom properties, per-attachment QoS override, NIC labels/SR-IOV**. No dialog-level **Sync All Networks** button (per-row only).
- **Host — Power Management** — 3 flags round-trip; **fence-agent CRUD** missing (see §3).
- **Host — Discover iSCSI** — the API fns exist but only inside the SAN wizard, not as a standalone host toolbar action.
- **Network New/Edit dialog** — missing Comment/STP/Port-Isolation/Label/QoS/DNS/external-subnet (see §3).
- **Network detail: vNIC Profiles / Labels** — read-only; per-network New/Edit/Remove profile and label assign/remove missing (global vNIC page carries CRUD instead).
- **Network QoS (DC) list** — read-only; consumed by the vNIC profile picker but no CRUD (see §3).
- **Providers / Users / Quotas / Roles lists** — all present but read-only shells; the mutations and detail pages are the gaps in §3.
- **Bookmarks** — full save/apply/delete UX but **localStorage-only**, not the engine `/bookmarks` REST collection, so they don't roam and aren't shared with GWT.
- **User settings / Preferences** — refresh interval / preferred console / 11 locales present, but **localStorage-only**; webadmin persists per-user via `/users/{id}/options` (roaming) — the acknowledged later phase.
- **Dashboard — Global Utilization** — CPU/Mem/Storage donuts + available captions present; missing the explicit **over-commit percentage line on CPU and memory** (only storage shows committed/allocated).
- **Dashboard — sparklines** — visual present but **session-local** (~20-min client window), not DWH-historical (deferred).
- **Dashboard — inventory** — grouped list rather than 7 tiles; rows don't deep-link to a **status-pre-filtered** search; **Gluster volume count** not surfaced as a row.
- **Dashboard — last-updated label + dashboard-local refresh** — auto-polls but no "updated at HH:MM" / local refresh control.
- **Tasks — correlation-id scoping + clear-finished** — shows all recent jobs; no own-session filter, no explicit clear/remove control.
- **Help menu** — About + shortcuts present; no Documentation link, no Guide entry point.
- **External Providers list** — merges host + network providers but only name/type columns, no selection/toolbar.

## 5. Deliberately deferred / out-of-scope (confirmed, not accidentally missing)

- **DWH-backed analytics** — historical utilization trends, per-object **heatmaps** + drill-down dialog, the exact committed/allocated the webadmin dashboard computes from the Data Warehouse, and the `webadmin/dashboard_data` servlet. Approximated live from REST; Grafana portal link ships as the pragmatic stand-in. *(PLAN.md §42–46, MEMORY.)*
- **Gluster** — volume list is read-only by design; **no volume/brick/snapshot/geo-rep/options lifecycle**, no volume detail page, no cluster Gluster Hooks / Services subtabs, no host Bricks / Gluster-Storage-Devices / Swift subtabs. *(Gluster out-of-scope for this console.)*
- **Legacy export-domain VM export** — only OVA export shipped; classic `ExportVmModel` treated as niche/legacy.
- **Disk Download (imageio)** — consciously deferred to v2 (`createImageTransfer` already takes a `direction`).
- **Storage DR (active-active geo)** — GWT-internal, no clean REST parity.
- **Active user sessions main tab / terminate**, **VM Sessions subtab**, **Force-Remove/Recover/Cleanup-Tasks DC actions**, **iSCSI Multipathing subtab**, **MAC pools**, and assorted per-entity **niche subtabs** (Template Storage/Events, Pool Permissions, various scoped Events tabs) — real but low-priority; roll in opportunistically.

## 6. Recommended next 5 (max parity impact)

1. **Storage-domain lifecycle actions — Attach / Detach / Activate / Maintenance / Remove / Edit** (Storage, **M–L**). This is the highest-leverage gap: domains can be created but not operated, which blocks the whole storage admin story. Wire the DC-storage-subtab action panel + an SD Data Center subtab, then Remove/Edit. Unblocks daily admin use immediately.
2. **VM / Template import pipeline** (Compute + Admin, **L**). Cover the two highest-value sources first — **register-unregistered from a data/export domain** (SD VM/Template Import subtabs) and **import from OVA** — then external providers behind the provider work. Closes the single biggest missing admin capability and the cross-DC move story.
3. **Disk main-tab New / Edit / Remove** (Storage, **M**). Small, self-contained, and it makes the Disks page a real management surface rather than upload-only. `createDisk`/`deleteDisk` already exist internally; add the image (+direct-LUN) dialog, edit, and confirm-remove.
4. **Governance CRUD: add-user-from-directory, Remove User, Role editor, System Permissions** (Admin, **L**). The permission *tabs* exist everywhere but you cannot administer principals or roles — required to retire webadmin's Configure dialog and run RBAC without the GWT portal. Sequence: add/remove user → role editor (permission tree) → system-permission grants.
5. **Cluster New/Edit full tab set + affinity-group CRUD** (Compute, **M–L**). Deepen the flat cluster modal to include Scheduling / Migration / Fencing / Console / MAC-pool tabs, and light up create/edit/delete for **affinity groups and labels** (already read-only on cluster/VM/host tabs). This lands the last big "flat dialog" and turns three read-only affinity surfaces into working ones.

Source inventories and scope basis: the five per-area JSON inventories above; deferral boundary from `/Users/lucas/cloud/Documents/code/ovirt-web-ui/docs/PLAN.md` (§Scope, Status snapshot) and MEMORY (`scope-webadmin-replacement`, DWH out-of-scope).
